title: Mala (disambiguation)
content:
'''Mala''' can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Mala (Twi'lek)|Mala]]''', a [[Twi'lek]]
*'''[[Mala (Wedge Antilles)|Mala]]''', a [[Gender|female]] individual known to [[Wedge Antilles]]
*'''[[Mala Thurya]]''', a [[Jedi Initiate]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Mala (planet)|Mala]]''', a planet in the [[Surd Nebula/Legends|Surd Nebula]]
*'''[[Mala (mythical figure)|Mala]]''', a mythical figure in [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] history
*'''[[Mala Blen]]''', Twi'lek ruler in the [[Thaereian system]]
*'''[[Mala Mala]]''', a [[Near-Human]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]]
*'''[[Mala-Ren]]''', a [[Voss (species)|Voss]]
*'''[[Mala Tinero]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]
*'''[[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck]]''', [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] wife of [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] nicknamed "'''Malla'''"

{{Disambig}}
